---
title: "John James Hornby"
---

## John James Hornby

**Dates:** (1868-1884)

### Description

headmaster of Eton College 1868-1884

### Biography

He was at Eton and at Balliol College, Oxford, with the Rt. Rev. John Coleridge Patteson, and was consulted by CMY when writing the latter\'s biography.

### Letters

- Letter from April 22nd [1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
